About MIBA

A Premier Institute With A Global Outlook

MIBA Professional Makeup Training Academy, established 4 years ago, is dedicated to enhancing beauty and grooming skills with a global outlook. As an ISO-certified academy, MIBA focuses on holistic skill development — combining technical artistry with personal grooming and entrepreneurial training to empower every learner.

Our academy provides an internationally recognised certificate on completion, and offers placement support through partnerships with leading salons across India — helping students launch confident, successful careers in the beauty sector.

  • Professional Hands-on Training
  • Practice Products in Academy
  • Student ID Card
  • Recognised Certification
  • Internship Opportunities
  • Basic to Advanced Learning
Meet The Visionaries

The Artists Behind MIBA

Two celebrity artists, one shared mission — to turn everyday learners into confident beauty professionals.

Founder

Pushpa Mani (Manika Pal)

Professional Celebrity Makeup Artist & Educator

With over a decade of experience in the beauty and makeup industry, Manika stands as a leader in her field. She is the proud owner of MIBA Training Institute, the most renowned beauty and makeup academy in Rudrapur — certified by the Academy of Rude Cities, and an accomplished assessor of Entrepreneurship Development Programs, recognised as the youngest female assessor from Uttarakhand.

How To Join

Your Admission In 4 Simple Steps

From your first message to your first day of class — here's exactly what happens.

1

Enquiry

Message us on WhatsApp or call the academy to share which course interests you.

2

Consultation

Visit the academy for a free one-on-one session to finalise your course & batch timing.

3

Registration

Complete registration with the course fee and receive your official Student ID card.

4

Start Training

Begin hands-on classes with practice products, expert mentors and real client sessions.

Good To Know

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need any prior experience to join a course? +
Not at all. Every MIBA course is structured from basic to advanced level, so complete beginners are welcome alongside those looking to upgrade existing skills.
What certificate will I receive after the course? +
You'll receive an internationally recognised MIBA certificate on successful completion, along with your official Student ID card issued during registration.
Does MIBA help with job placement? +
Yes. MIBA offers placement support through partnerships with leading salons across India, along with internship opportunities during select courses.
What's included in the course fee? +
Your course fee covers professional training, practice products used in the academy, your student ID card and certification. A separate Registration Fee (₹1,000) and Examination Fee (₹1,000) apply.
Can I enrol in a combo or the Full Master Course? +
Absolutely — combo options like Makeup + Hairstyling, Skin + Nails, or the complete Full Beauty Master Course (6 months) are available at bundled pricing, with the Master Course including free bonus business modules.
What are the class timings? +
Classes run from 11:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Tuesday through Sunday. The academy remains closed on Mondays.
